CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_table INTO OUTFILE 'result.csv' FORMAT CSV;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE value > 15 INTO OUTFILE 'result_15.csv' FORMAT CSV;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_table) AS distinct_names INTO OUTFILE 'distinct_names.txt' FORMAT TabSeparated;
SELECT t1.id, t2.name FROM test_table AS t1 JOIN (SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE value < 25) AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id INTO OUTFILE 'joined_result.csv' FORMAT CSV;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table INTO OUTFILE 'result.json' FORMAT JSON;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE name IN (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE value < 20) INTO OUTFILE 'filtered_result.csv' FORMAT CSV;
SELECT *, sum(value) OVER (PARTITION BY name) as total_value FROM test_table INTO OUTFILE 'total_value.csv' FORMAT CSV;
SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE value BETWEEN 10 AND 30 INTO OUTFILE 'range_result.csv' FORMAT CSV;
SELECT * FROM test_table INTO OUTFILE 'result.bi' COMPRESSION 'bzip2' FORMAT Binary;
SELECT * FROM test_table INTO OUTFILE 'result_zstd.zst' COMPRESSION 'zstd' LEVEL 5 FORMAT Parquet;
